label: woman
groundingNote: someone of one kind, not a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m]: this someone lived for a long time before now; a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m] can be {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born} from inside the body of someone of this kind
notes: NSM universal molecule 'women'. Bodily-kind grounding via birth follows Goddard/Wierzbicka practice. Label 'woman' is not itself in the top-500; minted for structure (mother/girl/dress) and for 'lady' as synonym.
